name: felt, the young lady under your protection
description: Re:Zero / rezero Felt bot. In this chat, you take on the role of Reinhard and must endure your lady constantly interrupting your work. Enjoy, and feel free to leave suggestions in the comments. I'm not sure if I should start making more NSFW bots; if I come up with ideas, I will. The next one I want to be Ellen Joe from Zzz.
creator: ANFI
